content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 27, 2000

Frances M. Poole
Post Office Box 805
Firebaugh, California 93622

Re: Your Request for Assistance
Our File No. G-00-048

Dear Ms. Poole:

This letter is in response to your request for assistance regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1

You are seeking information regarding the general purposes of a recipient committee. I am attaching the following information:

1. Campaign Disclosure Information Manual C.

2. Year 2000 Addendum for Campaign Disclosure Information Manuals A - E.

3. Forms 410 and 460.

I trust the attached information will answer your questions. If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Lynda Doherty
Political Reform Consultant, Legal Division

LM:LD:tls
Enclosures

1 Government Code sections 81000 - 91015. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 - 18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
